mapper.sql: select t.task_id, t.task_title, t.task_content, t.publish_user_id, t.receive_user_id, t.priority, t.task_status, t.progress_percent, t.start_time, t.deadline_time, t.finish_time, t.attachment_name, t.attachment_url, t.comment_count, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.remark, pu.nick_name as publish_user_name, pd.dept_name as publish_dept_name, ru.nick_name as receive_user_name, rd.dept_name as receive_dept_name from campus_task t left join sys_user pu on t.publish_user_id = pu.user_id left join sys_dept pd on pu.dept_id = pd.dept_id left join sys_user ru on t.receive_user_id = ru.user_id left join sys_dept rd on ru.dept_id = rd.dept_id
mapper.update: update campus_task set del_flag = '2' where task_id in #{taskId}
update campus_task set comment_count = #{commentCount} where task_id = #{taskId}
